title: Vanilla Optimized
description: A client side pack designed to optimize the vanilla game
body:
Vanilla Optimized


This pack makes your vanilla experiance a much nicer and smoother one. It also removes telemetry and comes with No chat Reports which makes chat unreportable (where possible).
** Will Be Added as soon a it is updated **
Iris is also included, it does nothing by its self but allows you to install shaders.

Full list of mods for current version of Minecraft:


  • BetterF3 by cominixo, TreyRuffy
  • Mouse Tweaks by Ivan Molodetskikh (YaLTeR)
  • Embeddium by embeddedt, jellysquid3
  • Fabric API by FabricMC
  • Dynamic FPS by juliand665, LostLuma
  • Krypton by tuxed
  • FerriteCore by malte0811
  • Iris by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames
  • Concurrent Chunk Management Engine by RelativityMC, ishland
  • EntityCulling by tr7zw
  • Sodium Extra by FlashyReese
  • ModernFix by embeddedt
  • Mod Menu by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC
  • ImmediatelyFast by RK_01
  • EMI by Emi
  • Lithium by JellySquid, 2No2Name
